slots.notes: Full-screen hero background. Professional e-commerce background - ambient, clean, with subtle patterns or a soft gradient that suggests premium. No people, no text. Native placeholder is a soft gradient background; replace with brand-specific visual asset. Fills the entire page - full-width, full-vheight.

The brand logo at the top-left of the hero. About 48px. It is an inline SVG icon or group-ic. Note: your brand logo gets the 'fg' text color - not a separate brand color. Native placeholder is a stylized circular shape or abstract logo mark.

Navigation links (product, categories, about, contact). Standard header. String of 4 nav items separated by space or pipe. No data backend. Native placeholder: 'Shop - Categories - About Us - Contact'. Note: text-body-color.

The primary CTA button - it reads something like 'Shop Now' or 'Explore Collection'. It's a quarter rounded button with bg and text-accent in the same purple. This is running text - no data backend needed. A simple button with hover: opacity 0.9. Border-radius: 8px. Note: text-accent-color.

Three text fields: a

heading

,

body

, and a subtext/disclaimer. Each one is in its own card or section. The heading is the most prominent - something like 'Style Your Way.' The body is a short paragraph. The subtext could be a date, a disclaimer, an expiration. These are running text - they are for you to fill in. No data backend. The heading is the most prominent - large, font-bold, tracking-tight. The body is smaller, more contrast. The subtext is the smallest. Note: bolder plate. Supply dummy text that reads well - brand will replace.

The secondary hero image. A product photo or featured item to showcase. A stylish, well-composed product image (clothing, accessory, gadget). Product-shoting placeholder image. Note: this is an additional image - the background of the hero is the main image. Use a really good product shotcase.

mechanic: A full-page hero with bg, logo, nav links, headline, body, subtext, CTA button, and product image. Left-text, right-image layout with full-width bg. Framer Motion useInView for entry.
techDelivery: React 18 + TypeScript. Tailwind CSS 3 as arbitrary values. Framer Motion v12 + for scroll-triggered animation. Icons from lucide-react.
reskinNotes: This is a blank slate for an e-commerce website. Every text blend is hardcoded as dummy copy - brand, hero (CTA, title, subtitle, body), navigation - there is no CS/backend. The fonts and color scheme are not tokens or variables - you are responsible for changing them. The assets (logo, background, product image) are for you to replace with your brand's. The color scheme is in - you can change. The brand name and nav links are no longer separate copySlots. They are directly in the assets.
